result:
Successfully cleaned and preprocessed the survey datasets. The R script:

1. Loaded all 5 tab-delimited files from data/input/ using readr::read_delim()
2. Merged datasets by NSID using full_join
3. Recoded wave-specific missing value codes to standard codes (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know/insufficient, -1=Not applicable, -3=Not asked, -2=Schedule not applicable)
4. Created age-specific ethnicity variables (eth14, eth15, eth17, eth_wave8, eth_wave9) with harmonized coding
5. Created consolidated ethnicity variable (eth) prioritizing earliest valid response for this time-invariant characteristic
6. Applied factor labels for all categories including missing value codes
7. Output cleaned_data.csv to data/output/ with 16,111 observations and 7 variables (NSID, eth14, eth15, eth17, eth_wave8, eth_wave9, eth)

The output file contains only the ID variable and derived variables as required.
